infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AI Offline Tour Guide uses your location to provide information about nearby landmarks and points of interest.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: AI Offline Tour Guide uses your location to provide information about nearby landmarks and points of interest.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: AI Offline Tour Guide uses your background location to automatically tell you about interesting nearby places.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: AI Offline Tour Guide uses speech recognition so you can talk to your guide hands-free.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: AI Offline Tour Guide needs microphone access for voice conversations with your guide.
